mapper.select: SELECT payment_id, appointment_id, payment_amount, payment_method, payment_status, transaction_id, payment_time, create_time, update_time FROM payment WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId}

SELECT payment_id, appointment_id, payment_amount, payment_method, payment_status, transaction_id, payment_time, create_time, update_time FROM payment WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT payment_id, appointment_id, payment_amount, payment_method, payment_status, transaction_id, payment_time, create_time, update_time FROM payment WHERE transaction_id = #{transactionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment (appointment_id, payment_amount, payment_method, payment_status, transaction_id, payment_time) VALUES (#{appointmentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{paymentAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{paymentMethod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{transactionId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM payment WHERE appointment_id = #{appointmentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
